title: surface T-###### plan ticket as deep-link on Kore timeline [T000373]
description:
## Summary

- `parsePr()` now extracts T-###### ticket references from PR bodies via `TICKET_RE = /\bT\d{6}\b/g`
- `writeRowToDb()` writes `tickets.ticket_links` rows with `kind='implements'` for each T-ref found
- `listTimeline()` batch-fetches implements links in parallel with fixes counts and exposes both `ticket_external_id` (display) and `ticket_id` (UUID for route) per timeline row
- `Timeline.svelte` renders a dotted-underline badge linking to `/admin/tickets/{uuid}` with `T######` as the display text
- `tickets-db.ts` schema extended: `ticket_links.kind` CHECK constraint now includes `'implements'`; the `initTicketsSchema()` migration is idempotent (DO block drops+recreates only if `'implements'` is absent)

## Test plan

- [x] `node --test scripts/track-pr.test.mjs` — 9/9 pass (2 new T-ref extraction tests)
- [x] `task test:all` — FAIL=0, manifests valid
- [x] `task workspace:validate` — manifests valid
- [ ] After merge: run `task tracking:backfill && task tracking:ingest:local` (requires `TRACKING_DB_URL` from `task workspace:port-forward ENV=mentolder`) to backfill `implements` links for historical PRs that already have T-refs in their descriptions
- [ ] After next PR with `T######` in body: verify badge appears on Kore homepage timeline after `tracking-import` CronJob runs (~5 min)

Closes T000373

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
